titleStmt.title: SII 30.166: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 166. (A.R. No. 245 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District Chandramauḷīśvara temple-on the south wall of the same maṇḍapa Rājēndra-Chōḻa I: year 25, day 330,: 1037 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records that the revenue official Madisūdaṉ Ādittaṉ of Siruvayalūr deposited 7(1/2) kaḻañju and 2 mañjāḍi of gold with the authorities of the temple Śri Pōndaiuḍaiya Mahādēva of Parākramachōḻach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Dāmar-nāḍu, a subdivision of Dāmark-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍasōḻa-maṇḍalam. The temple officials made this gift for constructing the tirumaṇḍapa at the temple. However, the temple authorities utilised the interest accrued from the amount, 45 kalam and one tūṇi of paddy for conducting festivals and for various offerings and worship on every Sunday and conducting rituals to the gods Pōndai Perumānaḍigaḷ Chandrasēkharadēvar and Goddess. The accountant Veṅgāvaṉ Tiruvikiramaṉ alias Brahmapriyaṉ figures as signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumanṉi vaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum porceyaṟpāvaiyum cīrttaṉic celviyum tanperunteviyarāki Iṉpu
ṟa neṭutiyalūḻiyu ḷiṭaituṟaināṭuñ tuṭaṟvaṉavelip paṭarvaṉavāciyum cuḷḷicūḻmatiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇarkkarumura
ṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭalliḻattaraiyar tam muṭiyum Āṅkavar teviyaroṅkeḻil muṭiyum mu(n)nṉavanpakkal tennavan vaitta cu
ntaramuṭiyum Intiranāramum teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatu Eṟi paṭai keraḷan muṟaimaiyil cūṭuṅkulataṉamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyu
m ceṅkatirmālaiyuñ caṅkatirvelait tolperuṅkāval pal paḻantivum ceruvilc ciṉavi lirupattorukāl Araicukaḷai kaṭṭap paracurāma
ṉ melvaruñ cān=timaṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta [ja]yaciṅ
kaṉaḷapperum pukaḻoṭum piṭiiraṭṭapāṭi Eḻaṟaiyilakkamum navaneti kulapperumalaikaḷum vikkiramavīrar cakkarakoṭṭamum mutirpaṭavallai maturamaṇṭala
mum kāmiṭai vaḷai nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veñcinavirar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācuṭaippaḻaṉa mācuṇitecamum Ayarvilvaṇkirtti Ātinakarakavaiyil cantiraṉ tolkula
ttintirataṉai viḷaiyamarkkaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittup palataṉattoṭu niṟaikulataṉakkuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭeruñceṟimiḷai Oṭṭaviṣaiyamum pūcurar ce
runalk kocalaināṭuntanmapālaṉai vemmuṉai yaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭaputtiyum raṇacūraṉai muraṇukattākkit tikkaṉai kirttit takkanalāṭamum
kovin=tacantaṉ māviḻintoṭat taṅkātacāral vaṅkāḷa tecamu n=toṭukaṭaṟ caṅkuvoṭṭaṉ mayipālaṉai veñcamaviḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇ
ṭirpaṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭaluttiralāṭamum verimalarttirtta teṟi puṉaṟ kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuṭ palakalañ celuttic caṅkirāma vicaiyottuṅka panmanā
kiya kaṭārattaraiyaṉai vākayamporukaṭaṟ kumbhakkariyoṭum Akappaṭut turimaiyin piṟakkiya perunetippiṟakkamu Ārttavarakanakarp port toḻil vācalil viccātiṟaṟ
ttoraṇamum moyttoḷir puṉamaṇipputavamum kaṉamaṇikkatavamum niṟaicirvicaiyamutuṟainirppaṉṉaiyu paṉmalaiyureyiṟṟoṉ malai
kaṭalakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamum kalaṅkā valviṉai Ilaṅkācokamum koppuṟu niṟaipuṉal māppapāḷamum kāvalampuricai mevilarpaṅkamum viḷaippa ntūṟuṭai vaḷai
ppa ntūṟuṅ kalaittakkor pukaḻ talaittakkolamun titamarvalviṉai mātamaāliṅkamuṅ kalāmutirkkaṭuntiṟal Ilāmuritecamun teṉakka vaār poḻil māṉakkavāramum
toṭukaṭaṟkāvaṟ kaṭumuraṭkaṭāramum māpporutaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājentracoḻa devarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 5 Āvatu [3 100 3 10] jayaṅ
koṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattut tāmark koṭṭattut tāmar nāṭṭup parākkiramacoḻaccaturvvetimaṅkalattu śrīpontai Uṭaiya mahā devarkkiṉṉāḷ mutal śantrātittavaṟ Uḷḷa
Ātittavāraṅkaḷ toṟu muraiccuḻiccericcūḻ Ātittavārap perumpali yeḻun=taruḷukaikkit tevar śrīkoyilvāriyarun tevarkanmikaḷoṭu Ikkoṭṭamvakai ceyta paṇimakaṉ ciṟuvayaluṭai
yāṉ maticūtaṉ Ātittaniṭai Ittevar tirumaṇṭapameṭukka koṇṭa poṉ Eḻukaḻañcaraiye Iraṇṭu mañcāṭi Ippoṉ koṇṭa paricāvatu kaḻañciṉ vāyt tiṅkaḷāṟukkup poṉ
palicaiyāka yāṇṭuvarai vanta poṉ mukkaḻañce yeṭṭu mañcāṭi Itu poṉ kaḻañciṉukku nelluppatiṉmukkalaṉey tūṇiyāka van=ta nellu nāṟpattaiṅkalaṉe tūṇiyumin=ta
tevar paṇṭāratte yarumoḻitevaṉ marakkālāle yaḷantivai yorāṇṭaikkāka vanta vāṭṭāṇṭutoṟum śantrātittavaṟ nivan=tañ celuttuvataṟku nivan=tañceytapaṭi Uṭaiyārkkut ti
ruppaḷḷittāmattukku nellu nāḻiyun=tirumeyppuccukku nelluriyu n=tiruviḷakkeṇṇai nāḻikku nellu mukkuṟuṇiyu n=tiruvamirtarici kuṟuṇikku nelluppatakku nānāḻiyu n=tiruviḻāveḻun=taruḷu
m can=tiracekaratevarkkut tiruvamirtarici yirunāḻikku nellaññāḻiyuṅ kaṟiyamirtu muṉṟiṉukku nellirunāḻiyum neyyamirtu Āḻākkeyiru ceviṭaraikku nellaṟu nāḻiyun tayiramirtu muvuḻakku nel nāḻiyu
riyum Aṭaikkāyamirtu veṟuṅkāyāṟiṉukku nelluriyum veṟṟilaiyamirtu paṉniraṇṭukku nelluḻakkum kucakkalattukku nelnāḻiyum viṟakukku nellu muvuḻakke yāḻākkun teviyeḻun=taruḷuvikku māṇikaḷ
Iruvarkku nellukkuṟuṇiyu n=tiruviḷakku piṭippāriruvarkku nel nānāḻiyu n=tiruppaḷḷittoṅkaliṭuvāriruvarkku nellaiññāḻiyu n=tirukkoṭi piṭippāriruvarkku nelmuṉnāḻiyum Uvaccarkku nel kuṟuṇiyum Ippaṭi ci
ṟuvayalūruṭaiyāṉ maticūtaṉ Ātittaṉ vaicca dhanmattukku Innivan=tappaṭi Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum van=ta Ātittavāram śantrātittavaṟ Ittevar paṇṭārattileyaṭṭi Iṉnivantañ celuttuvatākak koṇṭo
m Ittevarkku śrīkāryyam pārkkum śrīkoyilvāriyaruḷḷiṭṭa tevarkanmikaḷom Idhanmam rakṣippāṉaṭi En=talaimeliṉa Idhanmattukku vikkamRead- vikṉampaṇṇuvār kaṅkaiiṭaik kumariyiṭaippaṭṭa pāvattiṟpaṭuvār I
vai Ivvūrk karaṇattāṉ veṅkāvan=tirumikkiramanāṉaRead- tiruvikkiramanāṉa brahmapriyaṉ Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 30.166 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
